query: SELECT sr.*, ec.companyName FROM sku_rules sr LEFT JOIN erp_companies ec ON sr.erpCompanyId = ec.id ORDER BY sr.erpCompanyId, sr.ruleType;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wfg8FxM46VuY92.2046134b715b --database 5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8 --execute SELECT sr.*, ec.companyName FROM sku_rules sr LEFT JOIN erp_companies ec ON sr.erpCompanyId = ec.id ORDER BY sr.erpCompanyId, sr.ruleType;
